# Trend simulation network

## Signal layer

`visibility/cultural momentum`

## Pattern to test

many pages push same audio/topic/comments.

## Graph representation

multi-layer account-audio-caption graph.

## Useful metrics

early seed concentration, hashtag sequence overlap, caption entropy, cascade shape.

## Verification question

Does the observed traction signal look more like independent behaviour or repeated coordinated/synthetic signalling?

## Evidence to combine

- network structure
- temporal bursts
- content similarity
- disclosure or incentive evidence
- actor history
- external reporting or platform/regulator evidence
- downstream quality of demand

## Examples / source anchors

WIRED Geese/Chaotic Good; TikTok CIB research.

## Safe wording

"The observed pattern is consistent with `trend simulation network` risk indicators under the tested model. This does not by itself prove intent, fraud, or illegality."
